regions.grounding_phrase: the school bus reflected in the round mirror

modifiers.effect: regulation National School Bus Glossy Yellow

regions.rationale: US school buses are legally standardized to one yellow, but this one is a dim mirror reflection (region median L~20): at that luminance sRGB caps yellow chroma near b=30, so the resolved colour is the darkest feasible bus-yellow. Phase-2 lesson: resolve chroma at the region's actual L, not the object's canonical L.
Heavy overcast sky reads cool grey-blue.

regions.grounding_phrase: the orange and white sign on the wall
regions.rationale: The badge-shaped sign is the classic Harley-Davidson orange.

regions.grounding_phrase: the black rim of the round mirror
regions.rationale: Mirror housings are near-black plastic or metal.
